content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Pre-market opens with broad-based strength: Nifty +0.58%, Bank Nifty +1.04%, Auto +1.18%, IT +1.13%, PSU Bank +1.60%. Global cues firm (S&P +0.81%, Nasdaq +1.03%). VIX 17.91 elevated but stable. Existing book benefits from sector tailwinds (capital goods, auto, realty, chemicals) — focus on trailing SLs to lock in gains rather than aggressive new adds.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +5.9% on Q4 beat (PAT +19% YoY, NIM expansion). CMP 1042, SL 1029 already at breakeven+. Pre-market tape supportive. Maintain SL — gap to CMP is ~1.3% which is at the trail-floor; tightening further risks self-stopout on intraday chop. Hold structure into target 1110."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -2.4%. CMP 122.16, SL 119 (-2.6% room). Defensive hedge against geopolitical/INR risk; thesis intact. SL 119 below recent swing low at 121.40 — appropriate. No trail until clear move higher."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1690.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +1.5%. Q4 beat (PAT +9.4%, EBITDA +20%, cargo +15%). CMP 1725, near 52w high 1748. Current SL 1715 sits ABOVE entry — too tight at only ~0.6% below CMP, risk of self-stopout. LOOSEN — wait, cannot loosen per rule. Will keep SL 1715 (cannot loosen). HOLD instead. Retracting MODIFY."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 4,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -2.7% (CMP 13426 vs entry 13800). SL 13400 just 0.2% below CMP — virtually guaranteed stopout on any morning weakness. Better to exit on auto-sector strength (M&M Q4 beat, Maruti record April sales +33%) at any green-tape lift than to take the SL hit. Re-evaluate fresh entry on confirmed breakout above 13550."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 204.00,
      "new_target": 220.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -1.2% (CMP 206.44 vs entry 209). Q4 PAT +68%, GNPA improved. PSU Bank index +1.60% pre-market. SL 204 (-1.2% below CMP) is tight but supported by 200 swing-low. No change — HOLD posture, restate levels."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4555.00,
      "new_target": 4900.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +0.8% (CMP 4610 vs entry 4575). Defence tailwind, Rs 2.54 lakh cr orderbook. CMP-SL gap ~1.2% (just above floor). Q4/FY26 board meeting May 14 (within 3 sessions territory soon — monitor). Hold structure, no change to levels yet."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 372.00,
      "new_target": 410.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -1.3% (CMP 374.95 vs entry 380). Q4 PAT +156%, dividend declared, 18-year high hit May 4. SL 372 (-0.8% below CMP) — slightly tight but 18-year high momentum + Rs 2.4 trn orderbook supports holding. Stretched valuation noted; will trail aggressively if momentum resumes."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1420.00,
      "new_target": 1570.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -2.1% (CMP 1446 vs entry 1478). Q4 PAT +125%, FY26 sales record Rs 8,136 cr, net-debt negative, dividend declared. SL 1420 (-1.8% below CMP). Realty index +0.61% pre-market. Hold thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6900.00,
      "new_target": 7300.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +1.5% (CMP 7005 vs entry 6900). Q4 PAT +114%, EBITDA margin 34.2%, near 52w high 7200. SL at entry/breakeven — risk fully removed. Pre-market +3% suggests continuation; hold for target 7300."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 60,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 838.00,
      "stop_loss": 800.00,
      "target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Capital goods/rail capex breakout from 770 base; Jefferies TP 810 already exceeded suggesting fresh leg. Orderbook Rs 27,755 cr, Vande Bharat / metro tailwind. Risk Rs 38 (4.5%), reward Rs 62 (7.4%) — R:R 1.63. Position size ~Rs 50,280 (5% of capital), risk-budget = 5% × 4.5% = 0.225% of portfolio (within 0.5% cap). Q4 board meeting pending May — sized small as event-trade buffer. Cluster check: only HAL/BHEL in capgoods cluster; this is 3rd capgoods name — at the limit, no further additions today."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven+; gap to CMP appropriate. Let target 1110 work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position, SL appropriate, no trail until move higher."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 1715 is slightly above entry 1700 — wins locked. Cannot loosen. Allow position to either hit 1820 target or get stopped on a real rejection at 52w high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL only 0.2% below CMP — exit at market on auto strength rather than take SL slippage."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 204.00,
      "reasoning": "Banking strength supports; hold to target 220."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 4555.00,
      "reasoning": "May 14 board meeting upcoming — will reassess as date approaches; for now thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 372.00,
      "reasoning": "Capital goods leader on Q4 turnaround; ride momentum with current SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1420.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 strong, realty sector positive — let trade work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 6900.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at entry, downside eliminated. Ride momentum to 7300."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "POLYCAB Q4 results today post-market — wait for print before any cables-sector add. RRKABEL bearish (margins flat at 52w high). ADANIGREEN debt-heavy + SEC overhang — pass. LALPATHLAB volume divergence interesting but Thyrocare/Vijaya results May 7 add binary risk. CAMS, M&M, GABRIEL, VEDL all monitored but no setup clean enough to chase pre-market.",
  "portfolio_notes": "9 holdings, 49% deployed. Exit MARUTI frees ~Rs 53,700; TITAGARH adds ~Rs 50,280; net deployment roughly flat. Capital goods cluster at 3 names (HAL, BHEL, TITAGARH) — at cluster limit, no further capgoods adds today. Heavy result-week exposure across the book (HAL May 14, FINCABLES May 10) — will tighten/exit selectively as binary windows approach. Win rate 20% on rolling 5d is concerning but profit factor 2.1x indicates discipline on losses; net positive."
}
